evidence: This is a great comedy. I recommend it to everyone who likes a spoof.
Great music. This musical is a wonderful use of the music of Alexander Borodin.
Excellent story, very complex, but totally worth it.
Good lead character. Painful. Non love life.
Could do without about 90 percent of the 'F' bombs, but I guess we're just old fashioned.
I went back to the novel and compared the written with the filmed and was satisfied that the film had done no great damage.
For George C. Scott fans, this is a must.
I'm a big Stanley Tucci fan and he really outdid himself on this film.
The cast of characters, the plot twists, the culture, it is just captivating.

summary: The user enjoys comedies and musicals, often appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They have a strong emotional connection to the content they consume, indicating a preference for engaging and captivating stories.
